name: Boots of Bearing
description: Resplendent footwear fashioned for the ancient herald that first dared spread the glory of Stonehall beyond the original borders of its nascent claim.

abilities.name: Endurance
abilities.description: Grants movement and attack speed to all nearby allies for a short while on cast. Cooldown: 30. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 15%. Attack Speed Bonus: 50. Duration: 6. Slow Resistance: 100%. Briefly turns allies immune to slows as well.

abilities.name: Swiftness Aura
abilities.description: Increases the movement speed of nearby allies by a flat amount. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 20. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
